summary: Classified the PR inventory shard from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-opening actions are planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed individually; closed refs are kept closed; open PRs are either kept open for proof/author work or escalated only for exact maintainer/review decisions.
